description_long: This is a two-story Craftsman-style house with a dark gray gable roof and a symmetrical facade. The house is set within a fenced rectangular lot, featuring a paved driveway on one side and a green lawn with trees and shrubs on the other. The front entryway is covered by a prominent porch supported by square columns, and the main door is flanked by windows. The exterior walls are clad in dark siding, and the roof is finished with textured shingles. The property includes landscaped garden beds, a walkway leading to the entrance, and mature trees providing shade and privacy. The rear of the house opens to a backyard area, also landscaped with grass and trees.
description: A two-story Craftsman house with a dark gable roof, covered porch, and landscaped yard within a fenced lot.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry porch, driveway, and landscaped front yard with trees and shrubs.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the house, the fenced lot, and the distribution of trees and garden beds.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, additional trees, and the back facade of the house.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the lawn, driveway, and the arrangement of trees along the fence.
attribute_entryway_design: Covered porch with square columns, steps, and a central door flanked by windows
